questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '2c9f3aa1-0d3a-4332-80ba-0fa9c632df0b' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '867878a3-2efb-405c-8ba4-8e6d1137941b'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '2c9f3aa1-0d3a-4332-80ba-0fa9c632df0b'; delete from question_items where id = '2c9f3aa1-0d3a-4332-80ba-0fa9c632df0b';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
